content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (App/LoginView.swift: SecureField password entry) but review_information contains only placeholder credentials ("test"/"changeme") and notes.txt reads "TBD", giving reviewers no actionable path into the app.
Pierre: Apple's reviewers must actually sign in to test core functionality, so placeholder demo credentials and a "TBD" notes field will almost certainly stall the review or trigger a rejection. Provide real, working demo credentials (with the backend enabled) and replace notes.txt with concrete steps describing how to reach the app's main features after login.
